query: UPDATE workspaces SET subscriptionStatus='active', subscriptionEndsAt=DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR), pastDueSince=NULL, suspensionEmailSentAt=NULL, lastPaymentAt=COALESCE(lastPaymentAt, NOW()) WHERE id=1; UPDATE users u LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.id=u.workspaceId SET u.workspaceRole='agent' WHERE u.workspaceRole='owner' AND (w.subscriptionStatus IS NULL OR w.subscriptionStatus!='active'); SELECT u.id, u.email, u.workspaceId, u.workspaceRole, w.name, w.subscriptionStatus FROM users u LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.id=u.workspaceId WHERE u.workspaceRole='owner' OR u.isSuperAdmin=1 ORDER BY u.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ScXmtJuaTeKxeck.a823cb61aea9 --database ZqvPyEVdTkw9DPvc2ezGwV --execute UPDATE workspaces SET subscriptionStatus='active', subscriptionEndsAt=DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR), pastDueSince=NULL, suspensionEmailSentAt=NULL, lastPaymentAt=COALESCE(lastPaymentAt, NOW()) WHERE id=1; UPDATE users u LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.id=u.workspaceId SET u.workspaceRole='agent' WHERE u.workspaceRole='owner' AND (w.subscriptionStatus IS NULL OR w.subscriptionStatus!='active'); SELECT u.id, u.email, u.workspaceId, u.workspaceRole, w.name, w.subscriptionStatus FROM users u LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.id=u.workspaceId WHERE u.workspaceRole='owner' OR u.isSuperAdmin=1 ORDER BY u.id;
